message:
chore(cve_arena,beads): refresh cve arena run artifacts and beads tracker state

Regenerates three CVE arena result directories from fresh runs on the
current tree:

- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-15n.2/
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-18qq.4/
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-1f35/

Each contains the usual set of machine-produced artifacts:

  artifact_index.json  — manifest of the files produced for this run
  report.json          — top-level pass/fail with per-scenario
                         break-downs
  trace.jsonl          — per-step structured trace (largest file in
                         each directory)
  uaf_adversarial_detection.v1.json (bd-18qq.4 only) — the UAF arena's
                         adversarial detection summary
  {strict,hardened}/<scenario>/std{out,err}.txt — captured output from
                         the scenario harness processes

The per-scenario stderr captures for bd-1f35 (create_join_churn,
fanout_fanin_single, mixed_detach_join, both strict and hardened) picked
up small drift from the startup checkpoint + errno helper work in the
previous two commits: the process logs now include the new checkpoints
in order (ResolveEnvp → BindProcessGlobals → BootstrapHostSymbols → …)
and the errno values observed during the race scenarios come from the
ABI helper path rather than the raw `__errno_location` path, which
produces byte-identical strings but required regenerating the captures
so the test harness stops flagging drift.

No hand edits; these are all regenerated from `cargo test -p
frankenlibc-harness -- cve_arena` on the current tree.

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with the tracker state for the closed
work items that produced these changes.
